title: Two charges laid against Sabbagh
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Two charges of crimen injuria...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Two charges of crimen injuria have been laid against Knysna DA Ward 9 councillor, Sharon Sabbagh, by her fellow councillors from the EFF and the PA.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Two charges of crimen injuria have been laid against Knysna DA Ward 9 councillor, Sharon Sabbagh, by her fellow councillors from the EFF and the PA."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition, EFF councillor Neil Louw also lodged a complaint against Sabbagh with the SA Human Rights Commission.","html":"In addition, EFF councillor Neil Louw also lodged a complaint against Sabbagh with the SA Human Rights Commission."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The charges and complaint stem from an incident during a Knysna committee meeting on Tuesday 26 March when Sabbagh, who had the floor, was constantly interrupted. After the umpteenth interruption and pleading to be heard, Sabbagh asks: “…are we going to have a yappa yappa monkey circus going on here...?”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chaos erupted with councillors accusing Sabbagh of calling them monkeys. An accusation that Sabbagh emphatically denied.","html":"Chaos erupted with councillors accusing Sabbagh of calling them monkeys. An accusation that Sabbagh emphatically denied."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The crimen injuria charge, a “common law crime involving the intentional, wrongful and unlawful impairment of a person’s dignity”, according to the charge sheet, was laid at Knysna police station on Wednesday by Louw.","html":"The crimen injuria charge, a “common law crime involving the intentional, wrongful and unlawful impairment of a person’s dignity”, according to the charge sheet, was laid at Knysna police station on Wednesday by Louw."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna councillor Beauty Charlie (PA) also laid a charge of crimen injuria yesterday (April 4).","html":"Knysna councillor Beauty Charlie (PA) also laid a charge of crimen injuria yesterday (April 4)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Louw confirmed that he had laid the charge, saying the alleged remarks had upset him deeply and impaired his dignity.","html":"Louw confirmed that he had laid the charge, saying the alleged remarks had upset him deeply and impaired his dignity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition, Louw also handed a complaint on the allegations to the Knysna Speaker, calling for action against Sabbagh.","html":"In addition, Louw also handed a complaint on the allegations to the Knysna Speaker, calling for action against Sabbagh."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Deputy mayor Albert Marbi confirmed that the PBI withdrew a motion of exigency ( a state of affairs that makes urgent demands) against Sabbagh at a council meeting on Tuesday (April 3) .","html":"Deputy mayor Albert Marbi confirmed that the PBI withdrew a motion of exigency ( a state of affairs that makes urgent demands) against Sabbagh at a council meeting on Tuesday (April 3) ."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This was done after it became known that Louw had already submitted his formal complaint to the Speaker.","html":"This was done after it became known that Louw had already submitted his formal complaint to the Speaker."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Marbi the Speaker’s office is expected to table an item at council to investigate the matter, or to refer it to the Knysna Municipality disciplinary committee.","html":"According to Marbi the Speaker’s office is expected to table an item at council to investigate the matter, or to refer it to the Knysna Municipality disciplinary committee."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
